headline: Vitiligo Treatment in Chennai -- Honest, Evidence-Based Care
subheadline: An accurate diagnosis and a realistic conversation about treatment options -- not a promise of a cure that doesn't exist.
metaDescription: Vitiligo diagnosis and treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai from AIIMS-trained dermatologists. Honest, comprehensive management. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: No False Promises
whyPatientsChoose.description: We're upfront that there's no guaranteed cure, and discuss realistic outcomes based on your specific pattern and extent.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Full Range of Options
whyPatientsChoose.description: From topical therapy to phototherapy to cosmetic camouflage, we discuss what's genuinely likely to help you.

symptoms: New white or pale patches on the skin
Patches that seem to be spreading
Depigmentation around the eyes or mouth
Concerns about an existing vitiligo diagnosis

educationalInsight.title: Understanding Your Vitiligo Pattern
educationalInsight.body: Vitiligo's course varies significantly between individuals. Some patients have a few small, stable patches for years; others experience more extensive or actively spreading depigmentation. Understanding which applies to you shapes the treatment conversation.

steps: Skin examination, often with Wood's lamp assessment
Assessment of extent, distribution, and activity
Screening for associated autoimmune conditions where relevant

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: Is there any point in treatment if there's no permanent cure?
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: Absolutely -- treatment can meaningfully restore pigment in many cases, especially with early and consistent treatment. We're honest that outcomes vary, but that doesn't mean treatment isn't worthwhile for most patients.

processSteps.title: Evaluation
processSteps.description: Skin examination and assessment of extent and activity of your vitiligo.

processSteps.title: Treatment Discussion
processSteps.description: Honest conversation about which options -- topical, phototherapy, or camouflage -- fit your situation.

processSteps.title: Ongoing Management
processSteps.description: Regular follow-up to track response and adjust treatment as needed.

landingFaqs.question: Can vitiligo be cured?
landingFaqs.answer: There's currently no guaranteed cure, but treatment can meaningfully restore pigment in many cases. We discuss realistic expectations specific to your pattern at your evaluation.

landingFaqs.question: Will my vitiligo keep spreading?
landingFaqs.answer: It varies significantly between individuals -- some patients have stable patches for years, others see more active spread. Your evaluation assesses which pattern currently applies to you.

landingFaqs.question: Are there options if medical treatment doesn't fully repigment an area?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes -- cosmetic camouflage is available as a complement to medical treatment for patients who want it.

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about vitiligo and treatment options
